title: spiesia glandulosa
intro: Spiesia glandulosa, also known as Chinese foxglove or Gandoderma, is a type of flowering plant native to China. Its medicinal properties come from its roots, which are used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and skin infections. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Spiesia glandulosa include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
